nasb.text: He will take a tenth of your seed and of your vineyards and give to his officers and to his servants.

esv.text: He will take the tenth of your grain and of your vineyards and give it to his officers and to his servants.

cnv.text: 你們撒種所得的和葡萄園所出的，他都徵收十分之一，賜給他的太監和臣僕。

ccb.text: 他会从你们的粮食和葡萄园的出产中收取十分之一，送给他的官员和臣仆。
